beats.what: Waves crash gently onto a pebbly beach with white foam.
White waves roll onto the dark, pebbly shoreline.
Foamy ocean waves wash over the dark beach pebbles.
Gentle waves continue to roll onto the pebbly shore.

formal.text: Waves crash onto a pebbly beach with white foam.
White waves roll onto the dark shoreline.
Foamy waves wash over the dark pebbles.
Gentle waves continue to roll onto the shore.

sarcastic.text: Riveting. Nature is truly doing its thing.
Still waves. Still pebbles. Still mesmerized.
Truly, the peak of cinematic excitement.

humorous_tech.text: Request received. Initializing connection to the shore.
High latency detected in the foam delivery protocol.
Still waiting for the packet to fully clear the pebbles.
Connection timeout. The beach is stuck in a loop.

humorous_non_tech.text: The ocean is trying to wash the beach.
It keeps forgetting where the pebbles are.
Okay, now it's just getting repetitive.
Someone tell the waves to take a nap.
